post.summary: Login exchanges email+password for a short-lived session token.

put.summary:
ApplyAppConfig applies a parsed zattera.toml: upserts build config and the
service spec of each declared environment (create-if-missing).

post.summary:
Deploy creates a release (from an image ref or a completed build) and a
red/green deployment for it.

parameters.name: reveal
parameters.description: developer+ may reveal values; default returns keys only

get.summary: Top returns a process listing snapshot from inside the container.

parameters.name: body
parameters.description: StatsQuery reads historical series from the embedded TSDB (spec §3.10).

environments.title: environment name → spec, from zattera.toml [env.*] sections

idleTimeouts.description:
environment name → scale-to-zero idle window (lives on Environment, not
ServiceSpec). Absent = leave the env's current idle_timeout untouched.

set.title: plaintext in transit (TLS); encrypted at rest

buildId.title: deploy the image produced by a completed build

v1AlertRule.description:
AlertRule fires notifications on metrics thresholds or event kinds
(spec §3.10 / F23).

v1App.description:
App is a deployable application inside a project (spec §4). One app = one
service (one container image); its name is the service name in internal DNS
(<app>.<env>.<project>.internal).

meshPortBindings.description: Host ports allocated on the node's mesh IP, keyed by PortSpec.name.

jobId.description: One-shot job/cron run: set when this assignment is a Job execution.

v1Assignment.description:
Assignment binds one replica of a release to a node (Nomad-style
allocation; ADR-0004 / design §2.4). Desired fields are written by the
scheduler; the Observed sub-message is reported by agents and committed in
batched applies.

v1AssignmentDesired.description: AssignmentDesired is what the scheduler wants the agent to do.

meshPortBindings.description:
Effective host ports the agent bound on the node's mesh IP, keyed by
PortSpec.name. Reported by the agent after Start; the control plane merges
these into Assignment.mesh_port_bindings on apply (T-15).

outcome.title: "ok" or the gRPC error code string

v1AuditEntry.description: AuditEntry records every mutating API call (spec §3.13).

v1Autoscale.description: Autoscale targets; zero values mean "not used" (spec F7).

v1BackupConfig.description: BackupConfig is the cluster-wide S3 backup destination (spec §3.11).

v1BackupRecord.description: BackupRecord is one completed backup run.

platforms.description: OCI platforms the build targets; empty = builder-node arch only.

v1Build.description:
Build tracks one image build (spec §3.4). Build logs live in the log store
under the build id.

platforms.description:
OCI platforms to build for ("linux/amd64"); empty = cluster-arch default
resolved at build time.

v1BuildType.title:
- BUILD_TYPE_UNSPECIFIED: auto-detect: Dockerfile if present, else nixpacks
 - BUILD_TYPE_IMAGE: pre-built image reference, no build

token.description: Full join token: "K10<ca-cert-sha256>::<secret>" — pins the cluster CA.

v1CronSpec.description: CronSpec declares a scheduled one-shot run of the app image (spec F22).

v1Deployment.description: Deployment tracks one rollout of a Release (spec §4, §3.7).

v1DeploymentPhase.description:
DeploymentPhase is the red/green state machine (spec §3.7). Every
transition is a Raft apply so a new leader resumes where the old one died.

 - DEPLOYMENT_PHASE_BUILDING: only for source deploys
 - DEPLOYMENT_PHASE_PLACING: green assignments created
 - DEPLOYMENT_PHASE_STARTING: waiting for running
 - DEPLOYMENT_PHASE_PROMOTING: atomic traffic switch
 - DEPLOYMENT_PHASE_DRAINING_OLD: blue kept warm for rollback_window
 - DEPLOYMENT_PHASE_FAILED: traffic never moved
 - DEPLOYMENT_PHASE_SUPERSEDED: a newer deployment for the same env appeared
 - DEPLOYMENT_PHASE_STOPPING_OLD: stateful stop-then-start: old instance stopping before the new one starts (T-63)

portName.title: ServiceSpec port to route to; default first HTTP port

v1Domain.description:
Domain routes a public hostname (+ optional path prefix) to an environment
(spec F5/F6). TLS is provisioned automatically via ACME HTTP-01.

v1EncryptedValue.description:
EncryptedValue is an AES-256-GCM sealed value (spec §3.13). The data key is
cluster-wide; key_version supports future rotation.

activeReleaseId.description:
The currently promoted release. Changed atomically by PromoteRelease —
this is the red/green traffic switch (spec §3.7).

routeGeneration.description:
Monotonic generation bumped on every routing-relevant change; proxies use
it to order RouteSnapshots.

effectiveReplicas.description:
Effective replica count last decided by the autoscaler (within
service.replicas min/max). 0 = follow replicas.min.

v1Environment.description:
Environment is a deployment target of an app (production, staging,
preview-*). It owns the service spec, env vars, domains and releases.

v1HealthCheckType.title: - HEALTH_CHECK_TYPE_UNSPECIFIED: HTTP if the service has an HTTP port, else TCP

v1InstanceState.description:
InstanceState is the observed lifecycle of one container instance.

 - INSTANCE_STATE_RUNNING: process up, not yet passed healthcheck

releaseId.title: image source; empty = active release at creation

v1Job.description:
Job is a one-shot container run from an app's image (spec §3.12).
Cron-triggered runs create Jobs with cron_name set.

roles.title: roles the joining node may assume

v1JoinToken.description:
JoinToken authorizes `zattera server --join` (spec §3.1). The secret is
stored hashed.

v1LogSelector.description:
LogSelector picks which streams to read. Control fans the query out to the
nodes running matching instances and k-way merges by timestamp (spec §3.10).

v1LogSource.title: - LOG_SOURCE_SYSTEM: platform events about the instance (restarts, OOM)

v1Meta.description: Meta is embedded in every first-class object. `id` is a ULID string.

publicEndpoints.description: Publicly reachable "host:port" UDP endpoints for WireGuard, if any.

v1Node.description: Node is a machine in the pool (spec §4).

publicL4Port.description:
If set, the ingress proxies expose this port publicly as raw L4 TCP
passthrough (spec F5). HTTP traffic never sets this.

v1Project.description: Project scopes apps, members, volumes and internal DNS (spec F3).

v1ProjectMember.description: ProjectMember grants a user a role on a project.

configHash.title: hash of ServiceSpec + env var keys/versions

service.title: frozen copy of the spec at release time

platforms.description:
OCI platform strings the image runs on ("linux/amd64"). Empty =
unconstrained (legacy releases, uninspectable external images).

v1Release.description:
Release is an immutable (image, config) pair per environment (spec §4).
Version numbers are per-environment and monotonic (v1, v2, ...).

v1ResourceLimits.description: ResourceLimits are per-instance reservations used by placement and cgroups.

v1Role.description: Role is the RBAC role at org or project level (spec §3.13).

maxConcurrency.title: serverless mode: target in-flight per replica (0 = off)

v1ServiceSpec.description:
ServiceSpec is the desired runtime shape of an app in one environment
(spec §4). It is versioned into a Release via config_hash.

preHook.title: command exec'd in the service container before snapshot (e.g. pg_dump)

nodeId.description: Scope: exactly one of node_id / environment_id / app_id, or empty for cluster.

metrics.description:
Metrics: "cpu_percent", "memory_bytes", "memory_percent", "disk_bytes",
"net_rx_bytes", "net_tx_bytes", "rps", "latency_p50_ms", "latency_p99_ms",
"error_rate", "inflight". Empty = a sensible default set.

stepSeconds.description:
Requested resolution in seconds; the server picks the nearest stored one
(15s raw / 300s downsampled).

v1StatsQuery.description: StatsQuery reads historical series from the embedded TSDB (spec §3.10).

secretHash.title: hex SHA-256; cleared in API responses

v1Token.description:
Token is an API token. Only the SHA-256 hash is stored; the plaintext is
returned exactly once at creation.

v1TokenKind.title:
- TOKEN_KIND_PERSONAL: long-lived PAT
 - TOKEN_KIND_SESSION: short-lived, from Login

v1User.description:
User is a local user (SSO is M4+). password_hash is an argon2id PHC string;
API handlers MUST clear it before returning a User to clients.

lease.description: Fencing lease (spec §9.1): only the lease holder may mount the volume.

v1Volume.description: Volume is a named Docker volume pinned to one node (spec §3.8).

volumeName.title: references Volume.name within the same (project, env)

manifestKey.title: S3 key of the snapshot manifest

v1VolumeSnapshot.description: VolumeSnapshot is one point-in-time S3 snapshot (spec §3.11).

v1VolumeStatus.title: - VOLUME_STATUS_NODE_LOST: pinned node is down; stateful service stopped by design

clusterDomain.description:
Cluster app domain (cfg.domain): apps publish at <app>-<env>.<cluster_domain>.
Empty when the node has no configured domain.
